mapper.insert: insert into xhbs_points_order ( order_number, open_id, card_no, member_id, app_order_number, amount, description, type, custom_args, completed_time, order_time, client_ip, item_id, item_name, price, discounted_price, operation_device, created_at, updated_at, is_del, amount_type, app_id, orgin_points, after_points, rule_code, rule_name, scene_code, operation_kind, direction, trigger_mode, base_points, business_type, business_order_no, business_key, operator_type, operator_name, operation_time, order_status, idempotency_key ) values ( #{orderNumber}, #{openId}, #{cardNo}, #{memberId}, #{appOrderNumber}, #{amount}, #{description}, #{type}, #{customArgs}, now(), now(), #{clientIp}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{price}, #{discountedPrice}, #{operationDevice}, now(), now(), #{isDel}, #{amountType}, #{appId}, #{orginPoints}, #{afterPoints}, 'LEGACY', '手工积分', 'MANUAL_POINTS', 'NORMAL', case when #{amount} < 0 then 'DEDUCT' else 'ADD' end, 'MANUAL', abs(#{amount}), 'MANUAL_POINTS', #{orderNumber}, concat('POINTS_ORDER:', #{orderNumber}), 'STAFF', substring_index(#{customArgs}, ':', -1), now(), 'SUCCESS', concat('POINTS_ORDER:', #{orderNumber}) )

insert into xhbs_points_order ( order_number, open_id, card_no, member_id, app_order_number, amount, description, type, custom_args, completed_time, order_time, client_ip, item_id, item_name, price, discounted_price, operation_device, created_at, updated_at, is_del, amount_type, app_id, orgin_points, after_points, rule_id, rule_code, rule_name, scene_code, operation_kind, direction, trigger_mode, trigger_event, calculation_mode, base_points, multiplier, balance_bucket, before_frozen_points, after_frozen_points, availability_status, business_type, business_order_no, business_key, operator_type, operator_user_id, operator_name, operation_time, order_status, idempotency_key, calculation_snapshot ) values ( #{orderNumber}, #{openId}, #{cardNo}, #{memberId}, '', #{amount}, #{description}, 1, concat('operator:', #{operatorName}), now(), now(), '127.0.0.1', '', '', #{points}, #{points}, #{operationDevice}, now(), now(), 0, 2, '', #{beforePoints}, #{afterPoints}, #{ruleId}, #{ruleCode}, #{ruleName}, #{sceneCode}, 'NORMAL', #{direction}, 'MANUAL', #{triggerEvent}, 'FIXED', #{points}, 1.000, 'AVAILABLE', 0, 0, 'AVAILABLE', 'MANUAL_POINTS', #{orderNumber}, concat('MANUAL_POINTS:', #{orderNumber}), 'STAFF', #{operatorUserId}, #{operatorName}, now(), 'SUCCESS', concat('MANUAL_POINTS:', #{orderNumber}), #{calculationSnapshot} )

insert into xhbs_points_order ( order_number, open_id, card_no, member_id, app_order_number, amount, description, type, custom_args, completed_time, order_time, client_ip, item_id, item_name, price, discounted_price, operation_device, created_at, updated_at, is_del, amount_type, app_id, orgin_points, after_points, rule_id, rule_code, rule_name, scene_code, operation_kind, direction, trigger_mode, trigger_event, calculation_mode, base_quantity, base_points, multiplier, balance_bucket, before_frozen_points, after_frozen_points, availability_status, business_type, business_order_no, business_key, operator_type, operator_name, operation_time, order_status, idempotency_key, calculation_snapshot ) values ( #{orderNumber}, #{openId}, #{cardNo}, #{memberId}, '', #{amount}, #{description}, 1, '', now(), now(), '127.0.0.1', '', '', #{amount}, #{amount}, 'SYSTEM', now(), now(), 0, 2, '', #{beforePoints}, #{afterPoints}, #{ruleId}, #{ruleCode}, #{ruleName}, #{sceneCode}, 'NORMAL', 'ADD', 'AUTO', #{triggerEvent}, #{calculationMode}, #{baseQuantity}, #{basePoints}, 1.000, 'AVAILABLE', 0, 0, 'AVAILABLE', #{businessType}, #{businessOrderNo}, #{businessKey}, 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM', now(), 'SUCCESS', #{idempotencyKey}, #{calculationSnapshot} )

insert into xhbs_points_order ( order_number, open_id, card_no, member_id, app_order_number, amount, description, type, custom_args, completed_time, order_time, client_ip, item_id, item_name, price, discounted_price, operation_device, created_at, updated_at, is_del, amount_type, app_id, orgin_points, after_points, rule_id, rule_code, rule_name, scene_code, operation_kind, direction, trigger_mode, trigger_event, calculation_mode, base_points, multiplier, balance_bucket, before_frozen_points, after_frozen_points, availability_status, available_at, business_type, business_order_no, business_key, operator_type, operator_name, operation_time, order_status, idempotency_key, calculation_snapshot ) values ( #{orderNumber}, '', #{cardNo}, #{memberId}, '', #{points}, #{description}, 1, '', now(), now(), '127.0.0.1', '', '', #{points}, #{points}, 'SYSTEM', now(), now(), 0, 2, '', #{currentPoints}, #{currentPoints}, #{ruleId}, #{ruleCode}, #{ruleName}, #{sceneCode}, 'NORMAL', 'ADD', 'AUTO', #{triggerEvent}, 'FIXED', #{points}, 1.000, 'FROZEN', 0, #{points}, 'FROZEN', #{availableAt}, 'MEMBER_CARD', #{saleOrderNo}, #{businessKey}, 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM', now(), 'SUCCESS', #{businessKey}, #{calculationSnapshot} )

insert into xhbs_points_order ( order_number, open_id, card_no, member_id, app_order_number, amount, description, type, custom_args, completed_time, order_time, client_ip, item_id, item_name, price, discounted_price, operation_device, created_at, updated_at, is_del, amount_type, app_id, orgin_points, after_points, rule_id, rule_code, rule_name, scene_code, operation_kind, direction, trigger_mode, trigger_event, calculation_mode, base_points, multiplier, balance_bucket, before_frozen_points, after_frozen_points, availability_status, business_type, business_order_no, business_key, original_order_no, operator_type, operator_name, operation_time, order_status, idempotency_key, calculation_snapshot ) values ( #{orderNumber}, '', #{cardNo}, #{memberId}, '', -#{points}, #{description}, 2, '', now(), now(), '127.0.0.1', '', '', #{points}, #{points}, 'SYSTEM', now(), now(), 0, 2, '', #{currentPoints}, #{currentPoints}, #{ruleId}, #{ruleCode}, #{ruleName}, #{sceneCode}, 'REVERSAL', 'DEDUCT', 'AUTO', #{triggerEvent}, 'FIXED', #{points}, 1.000, 'FROZEN', #{points}, 0, 'CANCELLED', 'MEMBER_CARD_REFUND', #{refundOrderNo}, #{businessKey}, #{originalOrderNo}, 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM', now(), 'SUCCESS', #{businessKey}, #{calculationSnapshot} )
mapper.select: select p.id from xhbs_points_order p join member_card c on c.sale_order_no = p.business_order_no and c.is_del = 0 where p.business_type = 'MEMBER_CARD' and p.availability_status = 'FROZEN' and (c.status = 3 or p.available_at <= now()) order by case when c.status = 3 then 0 else 1 end, p.id limit #{limit}

select p.id, p.order_number, p.member_id, p.card_no, p.amount, p.rule_code, p.business_order_no, p.available_at, p.availability_status, c.status card_status, c.refund_order_no, c.card_type_id, c.card_type_name, c.dept_id, coalesce(cast(json_unquote(json_extract(p.calculation_snapshot, '$.pointsValidDays')) as unsigned), 360) as points_valid_days from xhbs_points_order p join member_card c on c.sale_order_no = p.business_order_no and c.is_del = 0 where p.id = #{id} for update
mapper.update: update xhbs_points_order set balance_bucket = 'AVAILABLE', availability_status = 'AVAILABLE', before_frozen_points = amount, after_frozen_points = 0, unfrozen_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and availability_status = 'FROZEN'

update xhbs_points_order set availability_status = 'CANCELLED', order_status = 'REVERSED', before_frozen_points = amount, after_frozen_points = 0, unfrozen_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and availability_status = 'FROZEN'
mapper.select: select id, order_number, amount, order_status from xhbs_points_order where business_key = #{businessKey} limit 1
select * from xhbs_points_order where member_id = #{memberId} and is_del = 0 order by created_at desc
mapper.sql:
from xhbs_points_order p left join member m on m.id = p.member_id where p.is_del = 0
and m.phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
and p.member_id = #{memberId}
and p.amount > 0
and p.amount < 0
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(amount), 0) from xhbs_points_order where member_id = #{memberId} and is_del = 0 and amount > 0 and created_at >= makedate(year(current_date()), 1) and created_at < makedate(year(current_date()) + 1, 1)
